iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 14% (up). Day 20 — DETERRENT. DNI Gabbard confirms IC: Iran enrichment 'obliterated' — contradicts war justification. Updated 2026-03-19T00:00:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 20 — IMMINENT. Unrelenting escalation. Israel kills intelligence minister Khatib (3rd senior official in 2 days). IRGC launches multiple-warhead/cluster missiles at Israel — first West Bank fatalities from Iran war. Iran strikes Qatar Ras Laffan LNG (world's largest). Houthis claim 28 drone strikes across Gulf. Pentagon requests $200B war funding. Oil >$108/bbl (+50% since war start). 1,444 killed in Iran. No ceasefire signals. Kent resignation signals US internal dissent but no policy change. Iran executes Swedish citizen. Mojtaba Khamenei silent. Updated 2026-03-19T00:00:00Z

💰 Pentagon requests $200B in Iran war funding — Congress confrontation looming
💀 Israel kills 3rd senior Iranian official (Intelligence Minister Khatib) in 48 hours — decapitation campaign continues
⛽ Oil surges past $108/bbl (+50% since war start) — US eases Venezuela sanctions to compensate
☢️ Gabbard confirms IC: Iran enrichment was 'obliterated' — contradicts war justification narrative
🚨 Houthis claim 28 drone strikes across Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Jordan — proxy war expanding
🕊️ Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire begins (Mar 18-23) — first pause, triggered by deadliest hospital strike
🚢 Hormuz easing: ship traffic nearly doubled — Iran enforces selective blockade only (US/Israel banned)

new: russia_ukraine: trump_deal_stalling (weight 3) — Kremlin says peace process fizzling as Trump focused on Iran
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: ~90 ships still crossing Hormuz per AP — blockade is selective (US/Israeli ships banned only), not total closure. Iran easing on non-aligned nations. Putin-Trump call today yielded no Ukraine breakthrough. Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire active Mar 18-23. ME military escalation continues with IRGC announcing Gulf energy infrastructure attacks.

latest_news.headline: IRGC launches multiple-warhead missiles at Israel — first West Bank fatalities from Iran war
latest_news.text: IRGC attacks central Israel with MIRV-style multiple-warhead missiles designed to evade defense systems. Cluster munition gets past Iron Dome — first fatalities in occupied West Bank (3 killed in Beit Awa). Israeli Defense Minister promises 'significant surprises' ahead.

latest_news.headline: Pentagon requests $200bn in Iran war funding — Congress uproar expected
latest_news.text: Pentagon reportedly requests $200 billion in additional funding for Iran war operations. Request could cause major uproar in Congress. Trump administration also eases Venezuela sanctions to boost oil supply.

latest_news.headline: Israel kills Iran's intelligence minister Esmail Khatib — 3rd senior assassination in 2 days
latest_news.text: Iran confirms intelligence minister Esmail Khatib killed in Israeli strike on Tehran. Third senior Iranian official killed in 48 hours (after Larijani and Basij commander Soleimani). Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei issues statement but makes no public appearance.

latest_news.headline: Houthis claim 28 drone strikes across Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Jordan over 15 days
latest_news.text: Iraqi armed group Saraya Awliya al-Dam (Houthi-aligned) claims 28 drone strikes across three Gulf states since war began. Expanding proxy warfare beyond direct Iranian attacks.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire begins — triggered by deadliest strike killing hundreds in Kabul hospital
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Le Monde / The Hindu
latest_news.text: Eid ceasefire active midnight Mar 18/19 through midnight Mar 23/24. Pakistan agreed 'in good faith'; Taliban says defending Afghanistan is 'national and religious obligation'. Pause triggered by deadliest strike: Pakistan hit Kabul hospital, killing hundreds. Pakistan warns operations resume 'with renewed intensity' after Eid.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 23:04 UTC) — (1) Ras Laffan LNG plant extensively damaged by Iran — world's largest gas export facility hit; (2) Iranian drone boat attacks 2 oil tankers off Basra — 1 killed, shipping attacks escalating; (3) Qatar expels Iranian military/security attaches — diplomatic break; (4) US gas $3.84/gal, Brent ~$105-110; (5) Gabbard contradicts war justification: Iran 'not rebuilding enrichment'; (6) Hormuz easing — ship traffic nearly doubled, blockade selective not total; (7) Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire active (Mar 18-23); (8) Israel-Lebanon: ground operations expanding, 820+ killed in Lebanon, 1M displaced; (9) Putin-Trump call yielded no Ukraine breakthrough; (10) No ceasefire signals in ME active theaters.
